## Sample Metadata

```{python}
metadata_ctx = context.get("metadata", {})
original_meta = metadata_ctx.get("original_file")
treated_meta = metadata_ctx.get("treated_file")
summary = metadata_ctx.get("summary", {})
missing_sections = []

links = []
if treated_meta:
    links.append(f"- Treated metadata: {link_label(treated_meta)}")
else:
    missing_sections.append("treated metadata path")
if original_meta:
    links.append(f"- Original metadata: {link_label(original_meta)}")
else:
    missing_sections.append("original metadata path")

if links:
    emit_markdown("\n".join(links))
if missing_sections:
    missing_line = ", ".join(missing_sections)
    emit_markdown(f"::: {{.callout-warning}}\nMissing {missing_line} in context.\n:::\n")

if summary:
    total = summary.get("total_samples")
    groups = summary.get("groups", {})
    bullet_lines = []
    if total is not None:
        bullet_lines.append(f"- Total samples: **{total}**")
    for label, value in groups.items():
        bullet_lines.append(f"- {label}: **{value}**")
    if bullet_lines:
        emit_markdown("\n".join(bullet_lines))
else:
    emit_markdown("> TODO: Populate metadata summary fields in the context file.")

for categorical in metadata_ctx.get("categorical_counts", []):
    column = categorical.get("column")
    if not column:
        continue
    emit_markdown(f"### Distribution by `{column}`")
    rows = categorical.get("counts", [])
    if not rows:
        emit_markdown("> No data available.")
        continue
    table_lines = ["| Level | Count | Fraction |", "| --- | --- | --- |"]
    for row in rows:
        level = row.get("level", "")
        count = row.get("count", 0)
        fraction = row.get("fraction")
        fraction = f"{fraction:.1%}" if isinstance(fraction, float) else (fraction or "")
        table_lines.append(f"| {level} | {count} | {fraction} |")
    emit_markdown("\n".join(table_lines))

featured_cols = metadata_ctx.get("featured_columns", [])
if featured_cols:
    emit_markdown("### Columns of Interest")
    lines = ["| Column | Description | Example Values |", "| --- | --- | --- |"]
    for col in featured_cols:
        name = col.get("name", "")
        description = col.get("description", "")
        examples = ", ".join(col.get("examples", [])[:5])
        lines.append(f"| {name} | {description} | {examples} |")
    emit_markdown("\n".join(lines))
```
